couple.brideDescription: A joyful dreamer with a love for quiet mornings, handwritten notes, and the kind of laughter that fills a room.
couple.groomDescription: A calm romantic with a love for music, sunsets, and making every ordinary day feel just a little more beautiful.
couple.sectionBody: A warm celebration of love, family, and the beautiful life ahead.

event.invitationLine: invite you to celebrate their wedding and share in an evening filled with love, music, and joy.
event.footerNote: With love, we cannot wait to celebrate this moment with you.

venue.title: An evening wrapped in lights, roses, and celebration
venue.description: Join us at the venue designed for a candlelit ceremony and a joyful reception under the stars.
venue.name: TTD Kalyana Mandapam, Vizianagaram
venue.address: 4C56+H92, Ayodya Maidanam Area, Jonnaguddi Area, Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh 535002
venue.landmark: Beside Gurajada Apparao Kala Vedika near SVC Ranjini Theatre Opp to Kota, valet and guest assistance available at the main entrance.

story.title: From college corridors to a forever promise
story.intro: Their story began as collegemates nearly a decade ago, with familiar smiles, shared classrooms, and conversations that slowly became the best part of each day.
paragraphs: Over the years, friendship turned into trust, trust turned into love, and the ordinary moments of college life became the foundation of a bond that only grew stronger with time.
Now, after around ten years of knowing each other, they step into a new chapter surrounded by family, memories, and the people who have watched their story become something truly unforgettable.
story.quote: We found forever in a friendship that began years ago.

schedule.title: A graceful evening of vows and celebration
schedule.description: Everything you need for the day, arranged so guests can move through the celebration with ease.

gallery.title: A decade in moments
gallery.description: A romantic collage of memories, companionship, and the quiet magic of growing together over the years.

contact.title: We would love to celebrate with you
contact.description: For travel help, arrival coordination, or any guest support, please reach out to the wedding hosts.
